tasks.subject: PT Task 1: mode2-profile CLI + derive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `mode2-profile` Python CLI with a `derive` subcommand that turns a stock vbmeta.img into a gbl-chainload_profile.xml.

**Files:** Create tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py, tools/mode2-profile/README.md, tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh -> PASS: 079 mode2 profile derive (or SKIP)

Full code in plan doc PT Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py", "tools/mode2-profile/README.md", "tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["derive writes well-formed profile XML with all 7 fields + provenance comment", "derive errors clearly on missing avbtool/vbmeta/props", "tests/host/079 passes or SKIPs cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: PT Task 2: mode2-profile compile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `compile` subcommand that turns a gbl-chainload_profile.xml into the 120-byte gbl_mode2_profile binary.

**Files:** Modify tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py; Create tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh -> PASS: 080 mode2 profile compile

Full code in plan doc PT Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py", "tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["compile writes exactly 120-byte packed gbl_mode2_profile", "compile rejects malformed XML / bad version / is-unlocked>1 / color>3 / wrong-length digest", "compiled binary accepted by mode2_harness profile-parse (status=0)", "tests/host/080 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: PT Task 3: gbl-pack --mode2-profile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend gbl-pack to embed a 120-byte mode2_profile binary as a GBLP1 0x0010 entry, supporting cached-only / profile-only / both containers.

**Files:** Modify tools/gbl-pack/pack.h, tools/gbl-pack/pack.c, tools/gbl-pack/gbl-pack.c; Create tests/host/081_gbl_pack_mode2_profile.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/081_gbl_pack_mode2_profile.sh -> PASS: 081 gbl-pack mode2 profile

Full code in plan doc PT Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gbl-pack/pack.h", "tools/gbl-pack/pack.c", "tools/gbl-pack/gbl-pack.c", "tests/host/081_gbl_pack_mode2_profile.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/081_gbl_pack_mode2_profile.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gbl-pack --mode2-profile builds a profile-only 0x0010 container locatable by parser_harness find-mode2-profile", "gbl-pack rejects non-120-byte / bad-magic profile", "gbl-pack errors on no inputs", "cached-ABL path unchanged (060/062 pass)", "tests/host/081 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: PT Task 4: make-mode2-test-overlay.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A single script that builds the mode-2 EFI, derives + compiles a profile, packs the 0x0010 overlay, and emits dist/mode-2-test.efi.

**Files:** Create scripts/make-mode2-test-overlay.sh.

**Verify:** bash scripts/make-mode2-test-overlay.sh -> ==> dist/mode-2-test.efi ready (<N> bytes)

Full code in plan doc PT Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/make-mode2-test-overlay.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/make-mode2-test-overlay.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["script produces dist/mode-2-test.efi from build+derive+compile+pack+concat", "accepts optional vbmeta path arg", "dist/mode-2-test.efi larger than dist/mode-2.efi; overlay locatable by parser_harness", "fails loudly on missing vbmeta/avbtool"]}
```
